result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 17:     AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mon...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH ch AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c ILIKE '%%owner%%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    COALESCE(ch.owner_change_cnt, 0) AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN ch ON ch.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
), eligible_aht_cases AS (
  -- only cases NOT transferred: exactly one owner assignment => no owner changes
  SELECT
    case_id,
    final_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM base_cases
  WHERE owner_change_cnt = 0
), agent_case_counts AS (
  -- counts apply to both initial and transfer-to agents: count each owner assignment event
  SELECT
    x.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
      AND ch.field__c ILIKE '%%owner%%'
      AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY x.agent_id
), aht_by_agent AS (
  SELECT
    e.agent_id,
    AVG(e.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_aht_cases e
  GROUP BY e.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM aht_by_agent a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    COALESCE(ch.owner_change_cnt, 0) AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN ch ON ch.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
), eligible_aht_cases AS (
  -- only cases NOT transferred: exactly one owner assignment => no owner changes
  SELECT
    case_id,
    final_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM base_cases
  WHERE owner_change_cnt = 0
), agent_case_counts AS (
  -- counts apply to both initial and transfer-to agents: count each owner assignment event
  SELECT
    x.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
      AND ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
      AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY x.agent_id
), aht_by_agent AS (
  SELECT
    e.agent_id,
    AVG(e.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_aht_cases e
  GROUP BY e.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM aht_by_agent a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    COALESCE(ch.owner_change_cnt, 0) AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN ch ON ch.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
), eligible_aht_cases AS (
  -- only cases NOT transferred: exactly one owner assignment => no owner changes
  SELECT
    case_id,
    final_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM base_cases
  WHERE owner_change_cnt = 0
), agent_case_counts AS (
  -- counts apply to both initial and transfer-to agents: count each owner assignment event
  SELECT
    x.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
      AND ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
      AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY x.agent_id
), aht_by_agent AS (
  SELECT
    e.agent_id,
    AVG(e.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_aht_cases e
  GROUP BY e.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM aht_by_agent a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
    COALESCE(ch.owner_change_cnt, 0) AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN ch ON ch.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), eligible_aht_cases AS (
  SELECT
    case_id,
    final_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM base_cases
  WHERE owner_change_cnt = 0
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT
    x.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
      AND ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
      AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY x.agent_id
), aht_by_agent AS (
  SELECT
    e.agent_id,
    AVG(e.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_aht_cases e
  GROUP BY e.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM aht_by_agent a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
